description_long: This is a modern military fighter jet with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and sharply swept-back wings. The aircraft features a single vertical stabilizer at the tail and two horizontal stabilizers, with prominent underwing pylons carrying missiles or fuel tanks. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage, enclosed by a dark, tinted canopy, and the nose is sharply pointed, likely housing advanced avionics or radar. The jet engine exhaust is visible at the rear, emitting a bright afterburner flame, indicating high-speed capability. The surface is finished in a camouflage pattern with shades of gray and white, and the landing gear is not visible, suggesting it is retracted for flight.
description: A modern military fighter jet with swept-back wings, a single vertical stabilizer, and a front-mounted enclosed cockpit. The jet is finished in a gray camouflage pattern and features visible underwing pylons and a rear engine exhaust.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and symmetrical swept-back wings with underwing pylons.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, single vertical stabilizer, and afterburner flame at the rear engine exhaust.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engine exhaust with afterburner, twin horizontal stabilizers, and the symmetry of the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cockpit profile, wing-mounted pylons, and the full length of the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept-back wings and underwing pylons; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine with visible afterburner.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visible, likely retracted).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a dark, streamlined canopy.
